# Auto Builder Required Canon Docs

These are the exact documents Auto Builder should receive before it is asked to build a full system.

## Minimum canon set
1. SYSTEM_IDENTITY_LOCK.md
2. SOURCE_OF_TRUTH_MANIFEST.md
3. INVENTORY_MANIFEST.md
4. COMPONENT_REGISTRY.md
5. BUILD_BACKLOG.md
6. BUILD_SCHEDULE_MANIFEST.md
7. RUNTIME_SCHEDULE_MANIFEST.md
8. RUNTIME_LEDGER.md
9. QUARANTINE_REGISTER.md
10. RECOVERY_RUNBOOK.md
11. RELEASE_RUNBOOK.md
12. SCHEDULER_GPT_HANDOFF.md

## Strongly recommended supporting set
13. MASTER_CLIENT_DISCOVERY_QUESTIONNAIRE.md
14. PRE_DEV_BRIEF.md
15. BUSINESS_PROCESS_MAP.md
16. SUCCESS_METRICS_AND_ACCEPTANCE.md
17. CONNECTOR_AND_ACCOUNT_MATRIX.md
18. SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_SPEC.md
19. UNIVERSAL_OBJECT_CONTRACT.md
20. INDEX_TAXONOMY_AND_MEMORY.md
21. FRONTEND_PRODUCT_REQUIREMENTS.md
22. ENVIRONMENT_AND_SECRETS.md
23. OPERATIONS_AND_RECOVERY.md
24. BENCHMARK_STANDARD_STACK.md

## Rule
If these docs are incomplete, Auto Builder should stop, classify the missing canon, and request or generate the missing artifact before pretending the system is fully spec'd.
